content: gemini-embedding-001 batchEmbedContents endpoint: POST https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-embedding-001:batchEmbedContents. Request: {requests: [{model: 'models/gemini-embedding-001', content: {parts: [{text: '...'}]}, embedContentConfig: {outputDimensionality: 768}}]}. Max 100 texts per batch (hard API limit). Input token limit per text: 2048 tokens. Output dimensionality: flexible 128-3072, recommended 768/1536/3072. Auth via x-goog-api-key header or ?key= query param. Response: {embeddings: [{values: [...768 floats...]}, ...]}.
